12.82.en: Head in the clouds somewhere — you're not really listening, are you?

17.41.en: The signs I drop on purpose, you're missing every one

21.12.en: See, it's the same every time — "we get each other"? That's a hell of a misread

26.09.en: You don't even notice me, standing right here, do you

30.07.en: Lost in the crowd, all alone

32.15.en: Hollow inside, I look up at the sky

34.35.en: A game of catch where the words never reach

36.11.en: The loneliness just keeps piling up

38.35.en: Hey! Hey! Answer me — is anyone out there?

42.80.en: No matter how long I search, no answer comes

46.88.en: Hey! Hey! Because only I can make myself

51.16.en: Cry, laugh, hate, love — let's live it all

67.96.en: A flat, featureless day by day — today's gonna be the same, isn't it?

72.61.en: Can't blend in with the people, can't get used to the streets

76.35.en: Ah, in the tide of people I stop, turn back, and check the footprints behind me

81.15.en: Maybe I've walked a little further than before

85.13.en: Caught in the glass of a street I passed

87.38.en: Was my own reflection, looking lonely

89.54.en: It pisses me off — that version of me,

91.39.en: and this world that couldn't care less

93.52.en: Hey! Hey! Answer me — is anyone out there?

97.84.en: No matter how long I search, no answer comes

102.08.en: Hey! Hey! If only I can make myself,

106.35.en: then don't tell me "whatever, it doesn't matter" — let me hear your real voice…

131.83.en: Hey! Hey! You can't live all on your own, right?

136.23.en: I won't throw my heart away just to fit in

140.58.en: Hey! Hey! You don't need a reason to give up

144.55.en: You too — dig your heels in and live in this city

148.85.en: Hey! Hey! Answer me — is anyone out there?

153.07.en: No matter how long I search, no answer's coming, so —

157.52.en: Hey! Hey! I'm the only one who makes me

161.41.en: Cry, laugh, hate, love — let's live it all

178.52.en: Cry, laugh, hate, love — let's live it all
